text: Some Jews were in the army of Nicanor, out of necessity (by forced conscription), but they were not willing to do battle on the Sabbath. They were willing to attack Judas, but not willing to offend against the holy day. That unhappy man (‘ille infelix’) is Nicanor.
The word ‘cognatis’ refers to close friends as well as to relatives.
The use of excessive precision, or excessive detail, is not fitting for an historical or Scriptural text.
